universityContact.name: Suffolk University ISSO
universityContact.office: Center for International Education and Study Away (CIESA)

disclaimers.legal: This tool provides strategic planning guidance and does not constitute legal immigration advice. Confirm deadlines and eligibility with your DSO.
disclaimers.uscis: As of March 1, 2026, USCIS Premium Processing for Form I-765 is $1,780 with an estimated 30-day turnaround. Standard processing is often estimated at 3–5 months. Confirm current information on USCIS.gov.
disclaimers.employment: Prioritize qualifying OPT employment. Confirm all employment, volunteering, or self-employment eligibility with your DSO before beginning.

statusMessages.notApplied: You have not applied for OPT yet. Your filing deadline is typically within 60 days after your program completion date. Confirm the exact date on your I-20 and with your DSO.
statusMessages.waiting: Your OPT application is pending. Use this planner to sequence outreach and preparation while you wait.
statusMessages.approved: Your OPT is approved. Your EAD Start Date anchors your job search timeline and unemployment tracking.
statusMessages.rfe: You received a Request for Evidence (RFE). This increases timeline uncertainty. Confirm next steps with your DSO.
statusMessages.denied: Your OPT application was denied. Contact your DSO immediately.

processingEstimates.standard: Standard processing is often estimated at 3–5 months (planning estimate).
processingEstimates.premium: Premium processing is designed for an estimated 30-day window (planning estimate).

finance.note: Finance cycles are structured and longer. Expect multi-round sequences.

tech.note: Tech hiring can be sprint-based. Portfolio strength matters early.

consulting.note: Consulting often includes multiple interview rounds.

healthcare.note: Healthcare timelines vary by credentialing and role type.

templates.title: Alumni Outreach
templates.body: Hi [Name], I'm a current international student at [University] studying [Major]. I'd value 15 minutes to ask about your experience at [Company].

templates.title: Referral Request
templates.body: Hi [Name], I'm applying for the [Job Title] role at [Company]. Would you be open to sharing advice on team priorities?

templates.title: Informational Interview Request
templates.body: Hi [Name], I'm researching [Industry] and would appreciate a 20-minute chat to learn from your perspective.

templates.title: Post-Interview Thank You
templates.body: Thank you for the opportunity to interview for [Role]. I appreciated our discussion about [Topic].

templates.title: 30-Second Elevator Pitch
templates.body: I'm a [Major] student focused on [Skill]. Recently I achieved [Result]. I'm targeting [Industry] because I'm interested in solving [Problem].

aiPrompts.title: Skill Gap Analysis
aiPrompts.prompt: Act as a Senior Recruiter. Compare this Job Description to my Resume and identify 5 skill gaps.

aiPrompts.title: Resume Optimization
aiPrompts.prompt: Rewrite my bullets using the Google X-Y-Z formula: Accomplished [X] as measured by [Y], by doing [Z].

aiPrompts.title: Cover Letter Review
aiPrompts.prompt: Review this cover letter for clarity and specificity. Remove generic wording.

aiPrompts.title: LinkedIn Audit
aiPrompts.prompt: Improve my LinkedIn headline and About section for keyword alignment.

aiPrompts.title: STAR Story Builder
aiPrompts.prompt: Help me structure this story using the STAR method.

aiPrompts.title: Company Research Synthesis
aiPrompts.prompt: Summarize [Company] mission, priorities, competitors, and 3 challenges.
